text:
# Layout & Information Architecture Redesign Proposal

## 1. Current Layout Analysis

### Current the-ai-U Structure
```
+----------------------------------------------------------+
| [the-ai-U] [Chat] [Characters] [Settings]    [Theme]    |  <-- HEADER (always visible, nav tabs)
+----------------------------------------------------------+
| [*] Connected  | CharSelector | Screenshot | Pet | Clock |  <-- SUB-HEADER (status bar)
+----------------------------------------------------------+
| Model   |                                    | Timeline  |
| Viewer  |     Chat Messages Area             | (optional)|
| (w-80   |     (scrollable)                   | (w-72)    |
| fixed)  |                                    |           |
|         |                                    |           |
+----------------------------------------------------------+
| [Voice Subtitle]                                         |
| [Speaking Indicator]                                     |
+----------------------------------------------------------+
| [Chat Input / Mic Button]              [Voice Toggle]    |  <-- FOOTER
+----------------------------------------------------------+
```

### Key Problems Identified

**P1: Tab-based Navigation Breaks Immersion**
- The header has 3 visible tabs (Chat, Characters, Settings) that are ALWAYS visible
- Navigating away from Chat loses the character entirely -- Settings and Characters pages are full-page replacements with NO character visible
- This creates a "web app" feel, not a "companion app" feel

**P2: Character is Confined to a Narrow Sidebar**
- ModelViewer is `w-80` (320px) -- roughly 25% of a 1280px screen
- In airi, the character occupies ~70% of the screen width
- The character should be the STAR of the app, not a sidebar widget

**P3: Too Many Chrome/Controls Visible**
- Header (nav tabs) + Sub-header (status + 4 buttons) = 2 bars of chrome
- airi has almost zero chrome -- just a logo and 3 tiny icons
- Connection status dot, CharacterSelector, ScreenshotToggle, Pet mode button, Timeline button all compete for attention

**P4: Chat Dominates the Visual Hierarchy**
- Chat area (`flex-1`) takes majority of screen space
- This inverts the priority -- chat should be secondary to the character

**P5: Voice Mode is a Footer Toggle, Not Integrated**
- VoiceModeToggle sits in the footer next to ChatInput
- airi integrates the mic directly into the chat input with a popover for settings

**P6: Settings/Characters Are Disconnected Pages**
- Full-page routes that break the companion experience
- airi uses a dedicated settings page but with breadcrumb navigation, not tabs

---

## 2. Proposed Layout Redesign

### 2A. Main Page (Immersive Character + Chat Sidebar)

```
+----------------------------------------------------------+
|  the-ai-U                          [i] [theme] [avatar]  |  <-- MINIMAL HEADER (transparent, overlays character)
+----------------------------------------------------------+
|                                    |                      |
|                                    |  Chat Messages       |
|                                    |  (scrollable)        |
|         CHARACTER MODEL            |                      |
|         (fills ~65-70%             |  ~30-35% width       |
|          of screen width)          |                      |
|                                    |                      |
|         VRM / Live2D               |                      |
|         with gradient bg           |                      |
|                                    |                      |
|                                    |----------------------|
|                                    | [说点什么...] [mic]  |
|                                    |----------------------|
|  [*] Connected                     | [trash] [gear] [cam] |
+----------------------------------------------------------+
```

**Key Changes:**
- Character model expands from `w-80` (320px) to `flex-[2]` (~65-70%)
- Chat becomes a RIGHT SIDEBAR at `flex-1` (~30-35%)
- Header becomes minimal and transparent, overlays the character area
- Navigation tabs (Chat/Characters/Settings) are REMOVED from the header
- Status indicator moves to bottom-left corner, small and unobtrusive
- Chat input is INSIDE the sidebar (not a full-width footer)
- Mic icon is integrated into the chat input row
- Utility icons (clear chat, settings, screenshot) move to bottom-right of sidebar

### 2B. Settings Access (Gear Icon -> Full Page)

```
+----------------------------------------------------------+
|  < Back to Chat                                          |  <-- BREADCRUMB NAV
+----------------------------------------------------------+
|                                                          |
|                    Settings                              |
|                                                          |
|  +--------------------------------------------------+   |
|  | General           General app settings            |   |
|  +--------------------------------------------------+   |
|  | Voice              Voice & TTS configuration      |   |
|  +--------------------------------------------------+   |
|  | Connection          Server & WebSocket settings   |   |
|  +--------------------------------------------------+   |
|  | Characters          Manage AI characters          |   |  <-- Characters merged into Settings
|  +--------------------------------------------------+   |
|  | About               Version & credits             |   |
|  +--------------------------------------------------+   |
|                                                          |
+----------------------------------------------------------+
```

**Key Changes:**
- Settings is accessed via a small gear icon in the sidebar footer (not a tab)
- Full-page settings with breadcrumb "< Back to Chat" navigation
- Characters page is merged INTO settings as a category (like airi's "角色卡")
- Each category can drill down to a sub-page with breadcrumb back nav
- No character visible on settings page (matches airi pattern)

### 2C. Characters Sub-Page (Inside Settings)

```
+----------------------------------------------------------+
|  < Settings / Characters                                 |  <-- BREADCRUMB (2 levels deep)
+----------------------------------------------------------+
|                                                          |
|  Characters                              [+ Create New]  |
|                                                          |
|  [Search...                    ]  [All] [VRM] [Live2D]  |
|                                                          |
|  +------------+  +------------+  +------------+          |
|  | Character  |  | Character  |  | Character  |          |
|  | Card 1     |  | Card 2     |  | Card 3     |          |
|  | (VRM)      |  | (Live2D)   |  | (VRM)      |          |
|  +------------+  +------------+  +------------+          |
|                                                          |
+----------------------------------------------------------+
```

### 2D. Voice Mode (Inline, No Page Switch)

```
+----------------------------------------------------------+
|  the-ai-U                          [i] [theme] [avatar]  |
+----------------------------------------------------------+
|                                    |                      |
|                                    |  Chat Messages       |
|         CHARACTER MODEL            |                      |
|         (eyes close, smiling       |                      |
|          during voice input)       |                      |
|                                    |                      |
|                                    |                      |
|                                    |----------------------|
|                                    | [说点什么...] [MIC]  |
|                                    |       +----------+   |
|                                    |       |Mic Device|   |  <-- FLOATING POPOVER (not a mode switch)
|                                    |       |Threshold |   |
|                                    |       |[Cancel]  |   |
|                                    |       +----------+   |
|  [Voice Subtitle overlay]         | [trash] [gear] [cam] |
+----------------------------------------------------------+
```

**Key Changes:**
- NO separate "voice mode" toggle -- mic is always available in chat input
- Clicking mic shows a floating popover with device selection/settings
- Voice subtitle overlays the character area (bottom, semi-transparent)
- Speaking indicator integrates into the character animation (not a separate bar)
- Character reacts visually (expression change) during voice interaction

---

## 3. Navigation Flow

### Current Flow (Tab-based):
```
[Header Tab: Chat] -----> ChatPage (character + chat)
[Header Tab: Characters] -> CharactersPage (full page, no character)
[Header Tab: Settings] ---> SettingsPage (full page, no character)
[Pet Mode Button] ---------> PetPage (separate window)
```

### Proposed Flow (Icon-based, minimal):
```
Main Page (always: character + chat sidebar)
  |
  +-- [gear icon] --> Settings Page (full page, breadcrumb back)
  |                    |
  |                    +-- General
  |                    +-- Voice
  |                    +-- Connection
  |                    +-- Characters (sub-page with card grid)
  |                    +-- About
  |
  +-- [mic icon] --> Voice popover (inline, no page change)
  |
  +-- [cam icon] --> Screenshot toggle (inline)
  |
  +-- [trash icon] --> Clear chat (inline)
  |
  +-- [pet mode] --> Pet window (via IPC, separate window)
```

**Route Structure Change:**
```
Current:                    Proposed:
/         -> ChatPage       /              -> MainPage (character + chat)
/characters -> CharactersPage  /settings      -> SettingsPage (with breadcrumb)
/settings -> SettingsPage   /settings/characters -> CharactersSubPage
/pet      -> PetPage        /pet           -> PetPage (unchanged)
```

---

## 4. Detailed ASCII Mockups

### 4A. Main Page - Dark Mode (1280x800)

```
+================================================================+
|                                                                 |
|  the-ai-U                                    [i] [D] [avatar]  |
|  .............................................................. |
|  .                                  .                          .|
|  .                                  .  [Character Name]        .|
|  .                                  .  ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~.|
|  .                                  .                          .|
|  .          @@@@@@                  .  AI: Hello! How are you  .|
|  .         @@@@@@@@                 .       today?             .|
|  .        @@@  @@@@@               .                          .|
|  .        @@@@@@@@@@               .  You: I'm doing great!   .|
|  .        @@@@@@@@@@               .                          .|
|  .       @@@@@@@@@@@               .  AI: That's wonderful    .|
|  .       @@@@@@@@@@@@              .       to hear! What      .|
|  .        @@@@@@@@@@@              .       would you like to  .|
|  .         @@@@@@@@@               .       talk about?        .|
|  .          @@@@@@@@               .                          .|
|  .        @@@@@@@@@@@@             .                          .|
|  .       @@@@@@@@@@@@@@            .                          .|
|  .      @@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@           .                          .|
|  .     @@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@          .  ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~.|
|  .                                  .  [说点什么...    ] [mic].|
|  .                                  .  ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~.|
|  . [*]Connected                     .  [trash]  [gear]  [cam] .|
|  .............................................................. |
+================================================================+
```

Width proportions: Character area ~65% | Chat sidebar ~35%

### 4B. Main Page - Voice Active

```
+================================================================+
|  the-ai-U                                    [i] [D] [avatar]  |
|  .............................................................. |
|  .                                  .                          .|
|  .                                  .  [Messages...]           .|
|  .         Character                .                          .|
|  .         (eyes closed,            .                          .|
|  .          smiling,                .                          .|
|  .          lip-sync active)        .                          .|
|  .                                  .                          .|
|  .                                  .                          .|
|  .                                  .  ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~.|
|  .                                  .  [说点什么...    ] [MIC].|
|  .                                  .        +-----------+    .|
|  .                                  .        | Input Dev |    .|
|  .  +-----------------------------+ .        | Threshold |    .|
|  .  | User: 今天天气怎么样？      | .        | [Done]    |    .|
|  .  | AI:   今天是个晴天呢~       | .        +-----------+    .|
|  .  +-----------------------------+ .                          .|
|  . [*]Connected                     .  [trash]  [gear]  [cam] .|
|  .............................................................. |
+================================================================+
```

Voice subtitle overlays bottom of character area.

### 4C. Settings Page

```
+================================================================+
|  < Back                                                        |
|  .............................................................. |
|  .                                                            .|
|  .                        Settings                            .|
|  .                                                            .|
|  .  +------------------------------------------------------+ .|
|  .  |  General                                              | .|
|  .  |  Language, theme, and display preferences             | .|
|  .  +------------------------------------------------------+ .|
|  .  +------------------------------------------------------+ .|
|  .  |  Voice                                                | .|
|  .  |  Speech recognition and text-to-speech settings       | .|
|  .  +------------------------------------------------------+ .|
|  .  +------------------------------------------------------+ .|
|  .  |  Connection                                           | .|
|  .  |  Server URL and WebSocket configuration               | .|
|  .  +------------------------------------------------------+ .|
|  .  +------------------------------------------------------+ .|
|  .  |  Characters                                           | .|
|  .  |  Manage AI character models and personas              | .|
|  .  +------------------------------------------------------+ .|
|  .  +------------------------------------------------------+ .|
|  .  |  About                                                | .|
|  .  |  Version info and credits                             | .|
|  .  +------------------------------------------------------+ .|
|  .                                                            .|
|  .............................................................. |
+================================================================+
```

---

## 5. File-Level Change Plan

### Files to MODIFY:

| File | Change |
|------|--------|
| `App.tsx` | Remove `/characters` route. Add `/settings/characters` nested route. Remove `Layout` wrapper for main page. |
| `Layout.tsx` | **Major rewrite**: Remove header nav tabs. Create new `ImmersiveLayout` with minimal transparent header + character area + chat sidebar. |
| `ChatPage.tsx` -> rename to `MainPage.tsx` | Restructure: character becomes `flex-[2]`, chat becomes `flex-1` sidebar. Move chat input INSIDE sidebar. Remove sub-header bar. Move status to bottom-left overlay. |
| `ModelViewer.tsx` | Change from `w-80` fixed to `flex-[2]` or percentage-based. Add support for transparent header overlay. |
| `ChatInput.tsx` | Integrate mic icon directly into the input row. Remove full-width footer styling, make it sidebar-width. |
| `VoiceModeToggle.tsx` | **Remove** as a separate component. Mic is always visible in ChatInput. |
| `MicButton.tsx` | Refactor into inline mic icon + floating popover for settings/device selection. |
| `VoiceSubtitle.tsx` | Change positioning to overlay the character area (absolute, bottom of character zone). |
| `SpeakingIndicator.tsx` | Simplify or remove -- speaking state should drive character animation, not a separate UI bar. |
| `SettingsPage.tsx` | Add category list view (title + description). Add breadcrumb "< Back" navigation. Merge CharactersPage as a sub-route. |
| `CharactersPage.tsx` | Convert from standalone page to settings sub-page. Add breadcrumb "< Settings / Characters". |
| `CharacterSelector.tsx` | Move from sub-header to header or remove (character name shown in chat sidebar header). |
| `NetworkBanner.tsx` | Restyle as a small overlay toast, not a full-width banner. |

### Files to CREATE:

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `components/ImmersiveLayout.tsx` | New layout wrapper: minimal header + full-screen character + chat sidebar |
| `components/ChatSidebar.tsx` | Extract chat sidebar: messages + input + utility icons as a cohesive unit |
| `components/MinimalHeader.tsx` | Transparent minimal header: logo + 3 tiny icons |
| `components/SidebarFooter.tsx` | Bottom row of sidebar: trash, gear, cam icons |

### Files to REMOVE / DEPRECATE:

| File | Reason |
|------|--------|
| `Layout.tsx` | Replaced by `ImmersiveLayout.tsx` |
| `VoiceModeToggle.tsx` | Mic integrated into ChatInput |

---

## 6. Component Hierarchy (Proposed)

```
App
├── HashRouter
│   ├── Route "/" -> ImmersiveLayout
│   │   └── MainPage
│   │       ├── MinimalHeader (transparent overlay)
│   │       │   ├── Logo "the-ai-U"
│   │       │   └── Icons: [info] [theme] [avatar]
│   │       ├── CharacterArea (flex-[2])
│   │       │   ├── ModelViewer (fills container)
│   │       │   ├── VoiceSubtitle (absolute bottom overlay)
│   │       │   └── StatusDot (absolute bottom-left)
│   │       └── ChatSidebar (flex-1, max-w-md)
│   │           ├── SidebarHeader (character name)
│   │           ├── MessageList (scrollable)
│   │           ├── ChatInput + MicIcon
│   │           └── SidebarFooter [trash] [gear->navigate] [cam]
│   ├── Route "/settings" -> SettingsLayout
│   │   ├── SettingsPage (category list)
│   │   └── Route "/settings/characters" -> CharactersSubPage
│   └── Route "/pet" -> PetPage (unchanged)
```

---

## 7. Migration Priority

**Phase 1 (Layout Structure):**
1. Create `ImmersiveLayout.tsx` and `MinimalHeader.tsx`
2. Restructure `ChatPage.tsx` -> `MainPage.tsx` with 65/35 split
3. Move chat input inside sidebar
4. Update `App.tsx` routes

**Phase 2 (Navigation):**
1. Remove tab navigation from header
2. Add gear icon to sidebar footer
3. Add breadcrumb navigation to Settings
4. Merge Characters into Settings as sub-route

**Phase 3 (Voice Integration):**
1. Integrate mic into ChatInput
2. Create mic popover for settings
3. Move VoiceSubtitle to character overlay
4. Remove VoiceModeToggle

**Phase 4 (Polish):**
1. Transparent header with gradient fade
2. Character area gradient background
3. Sidebar glass-morphism styling
4. Status indicator refinement

---

## 8. Key Design Principles

1. **Character-First**: The character IS the app. Everything else is secondary UI.
2. **Minimal Chrome**: Reduce visible controls to near-zero on the main page.
3. **Contextual Access**: Settings/Characters accessed via icons, not always-visible tabs.
4. **Integrated Voice**: Mic is part of the input, not a mode switch.
5. **Overlay, Don't Replace**: Status, subtitles, and indicators overlay the character area rather than taking their own rows.
6. **Breadcrumb Navigation**: Settings uses drill-down with back navigation, not tab switching.

This redesign transforms the-ai-U from a "web app with a character sidebar" into an "immersive companion experience with a chat panel".
summary: Complete layout redesign proposal with ASCII mockups

text:
# UX/Interaction Design Redesign Proposal: the-ai-U vs airi

---

## 1. Main Page Interaction Surface Audit

### Current State (the-ai-U)

The main ChatPage has a **heavily overloaded toolbar** at the top:

```
[Status Dot] [Status Text]  -----spacer-----  [CharacterSelector] [ScreenshotToggle] [PetMode Button] [Timeline Button]
```

Plus a **separate footer** with mode-switching:
```
[ChatInput OR MicButton]  [VoiceModeToggle]
```

**Total interactive elements on main page: 8+ controls visible simultaneously**

### airi Reference

airi's main page has **extreme minimalism**:
- Character area (just the Live2D model)
- Chat sidebar with input
- 3 tiny icons top-right (info, dark mode, user)
- 3 tiny icons bottom-right (trash, settings, camera)
- **Total: ~6 tiny icons + chat input**

### Audit: What Stays vs What Moves

| Element | Current Location | Recommendation | Reason |
|---------|-----------------|----------------|--------|
| Connection status dot | Top toolbar | **STAYS** - but move to bottom-right as subtle indicator | Always-needed but non-primary |
| CharacterSelector | Top toolbar | **MOVE to Settings** | Infrequent action, clutters main view |
| ScreenshotToggle | Top toolbar | **MOVE to Settings** | Power-user feature, not daily interaction |
| Pet Mode button | Top toolbar | **MOVE to tray/menu** | Rare action, system-level |
| Timeline toggle | Top toolbar | **REMOVE from toolbar**, add as slide-out gesture or settings option | Niche feature |
| ThemeToggle | Header (Layout) | **STAYS** - move to top-right icon cluster | Universal utility |
| Nav tabs (Chat/Characters/Settings) | Header (Layout) | **REMOVE visible tabs** | See Section 6 |

**Result: Main page should have ~4-5 tiny icons maximum, no toolbar text labels.**

---

## 2. Chat Input Redesign: Unified Input with Integrated Mic

### Current Problem

The current design uses a **binary mode switch** (`VoiceModeToggle`):
- Text mode: shows `ChatInput` (text field + Send button)
- Voice mode: shows `MicButton` (round button centered, no text input)

This is **fundamentally wrong** because:
1. User must consciously "switch modes" before speaking
2. Text input disappears entirely in voice mode
3. No quick voice access from text mode
4. Two mutually exclusive UIs instead of one unified surface

### Proposed Design: Unified Chat Input

```
┌────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  [text input field.................................] [🎤] │
│                                                         │
│  When mic icon clicked:                                 │
│  ┌─────────────────────────┐                           │
│  │    ┌───┐                │  Floating popover          │
│  │    │ 🎤│  Listening...   │  above the input           │
│  │    └───┘                │                            │
│  │  ═══════════ waveform   │                            │
│  │  [Input device: v]      │                            │
│  │  [Cancel]               │                            │
│  └─────────────────────────┘                           │
└────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

**Key changes:**
1. **Mic icon is always visible** inside/beside the text input (like airi)
2. **No mode toggle needed** - text input is always available
3. Clicking mic opens a **floating popover** (not a mode switch)
4. Popover shows: mic status, waveform visualization, device selector
5. Text input remains accessible even while voice popover is open
6. STT result auto-fills the text input, user can edit before sending

### Components to Modify
- **DELETE**: `VoiceModeToggle.tsx` - no longer needed
- **MERGE**: `MicButton.tsx` into a new `VoiceMicPopover.tsx`
- **MODIFY**: `ChatInput.tsx` - add integrated mic icon + popover trigger
- **MODIFY**: `voiceStore.ts` - remove `mode` field, add `isVoicePopoverOpen`

---

## 3. Voice Interaction Flow

### Current Flow (Problematic)

```
User wants to speak
    │
    ▼
Finds VoiceModeToggle ──► Clicks to switch to voice mode
    │
    ▼
ChatInput disappears, MicButton appears
    │
    ▼
Clicks MicButton to start recording
    │
    ▼
Speaks... recording auto-sends as base64
    │
    ▼
To type again: find toggle, switch back to text mode
```

**Problems**: 3 steps to start speaking, loses text context, mode confusion

### Proposed Flow (airi-style)

```
User wants to speak
    │
    ▼
Clicks mic icon (always visible in input area)
    │
    ▼
Popover opens with large mic button + waveform
    │                                         │
    ├── Voice detected: STT processes         │
    │   Result fills text input               │
    │   User can edit + Send                  │
    │                                         │
    └── Click outside or Cancel: popover closes
        Text input remains focused
```

**Benefits**: 1 click to start, text always available, no mode confusion

### Voice State Indicators in Popover

```
State: Idle (popover open)
┌──────────────────────┐
│     ○  Tap to speak  │
│  [Mic: Default ▾]    │
└──────────────────────┘

State: Listening
┌──────────────────────┐
│     ●  Listening...  │
│  ═══════ waveform    │
│  [Stop]              │
└──────────────────────┘

State: Processing
┌──────────────────────┐
│     ⟳  Processing... │
│  "你好世界..."        │
│  [Cancel]            │
└──────────────────────┘
```

---

## 4. Utility Icons Placement and Behavior

### Proposed Icon Layout

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                                          [☀️] [👤]  [ℹ️] │  Top-right: theme, user, info
│                                                         │
│                                                         │
│           [Character Area]       [Chat Messages]        │
│                                                         │
│                                                         │
│                                          [🗑️] [⚙️] [📷] │  Bottom-right: clear, settings, screenshot
│  ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────  │
│  [text input..................................] [🎤]     │  Footer: unified input
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

### Icon Behaviors

| Icon | Position | Action | Current Equivalent |
|------|----------|--------|--------------------|
| Theme toggle | Top-right | Click to cycle light/dark/system | `ThemeToggle` in header |
| User icon | Top-right | Opens user profile/preferences popover | NEW |
| Info icon | Top-right | Shows app info/help tooltip | NEW |
| Clear chat | Bottom-right | Clears chat history (with confirmation) | Currently missing |
| Settings gear | Bottom-right | Navigates to settings (full page) | Currently in nav tabs |
| Screenshot | Bottom-right | Toggles screenshot capture | `ScreenshotToggle` (moved from toolbar) |
| Mic | Input area | Opens voice popover | `MicButton` + `VoiceModeToggle` (merged) |

### Icon Styling Rules
- All icons: 16x16px (w-4 h-4), ghost/transparent background
- No text labels on icons (tooltip on hover only)
- Opacity: 60% default, 100% on hover
- Active state: primary color highlight
- Grouped in clusters of 2-3, separated by 8px gap

---

## 5. State Indicators Redesign

### Current Problems

1. **Connection status**: Takes up toolbar space with text + dot
2. **SpeakingIndicator**: Appears as a separate bar between content and footer, pushing layout
3. **VoiceSubtitle**: Another separate bar with user/AI text, also pushing layout
4. **Multiple competing attention zones** when voice is active

### Proposed Redesign

#### A. Connection Status → Subtle Bottom-Right Dot

```
Current:  [● Connected]  (top toolbar, with text)
Proposed: [●]            (bottom-right corner, tiny dot only)
                          Green = connected
                          Yellow = reconnecting  
                          Red = disconnected
                          Tooltip on hover shows status text
```

Only show a toast notification on status changes (already implemented).

#### B. SpeakingIndicator → Character Animation Only

Remove the separate `SpeakingIndicator` bar. Instead:
- Character model mouth/expression animation already shows speaking state
- Add a subtle glow/pulse around the character area border when AI is speaking
- This is more immersive and doesn't break layout

```
Current:  [bars] AI Speaking...    (separate bar, pushes layout)
Proposed: Character area border glows/pulses when speaking
```

#### C. VoiceSubtitle → Overlay on Character Area

Instead of a separate bar, show subtitles as an overlay at the bottom of the character area:

```
┌──────────────────────┐
│                      │
│    [3D Character]    │
│                      │
│  ┌────────────────┐  │
│  │ You: 你好       │  │  Semi-transparent overlay
│  │ AI: 你好呀~    │  │  within character panel
│  └────────────────┘  │
└──────────────────────┘
```

**Benefits**: 
- No layout shifting
- Subtitles appear near the character (natural reading position)
- Main chat area unaffected

---

## 6. Settings Consolidation Plan

### Current Structure

```
App Routes:
├── / (ChatPage)           ← has its own mini-toolbar with CharacterSelector, Screenshot, PetMode, Timeline
├── /characters (CharactersPage)  ← full CRUD page, separate route
└── /settings (SettingsPage)      ← General, Voice, Connection, About sections
```

**Problem**: Navigation tabs always visible, Characters as a top-level route feels heavy, too many settings scattered across ChatPage toolbar and SettingsPage.

### Proposed Structure (airi-style)

**Remove visible nav tabs entirely.** Settings accessed via gear icon.

```
Main View (always visible):
├── Character panel (left)
├── Chat panel (right)
├── Unified input (bottom)
└── Icon clusters (top-right, bottom-right)

Settings (full page, replaces main view on gear click):
├── 一般设置 (General)
│   ├── Language
│   ├── Theme (move from top-right to settings too)
│   └── Notifications
│
├── 角色管理 (Characters)          ← ABSORB CharactersPage here
│   ├── Character cards grid
│   ├── Create/Edit/Delete
│   └── Search & filter
│
├── 语音设置 (Voice & Audio)
│   ├── Input device selection
│   ├── STT provider config
│   ├── TTS provider config
│   └── Voice detection sensitivity
│
├── 视觉效果 (Visual)              ← NEW category
│   ├── Screenshot capture toggle
│   ├── Character display preferences
│   └── Animation settings
│
├── 连接 (Connection)
│   ├── WebSocket URL
│   ├── Auto-reconnect
│   └── Offline mode preferences
│
├── 桌宠模式 (Pet Mode)            ← MOVE from toolbar
│   ├── Enable/disable
│   ├── Window behavior
│   └── Hotkey config
│
└── 关于 (About)
    ├── Version info
    └── Links
```

### Navigation Within Settings

Use airi's drill-down pattern:

```
Settings List:                    Category Detail:
┌────────────────────────┐       ┌────────────────────────┐
│  ← Back                │       │  ← 语音设置             │
│                        │       │                        │
│  ▸ 一般设置         >  │  ──►  │  输入设备               │
│  ▸ 角色管理         >  │       │  [Default Mic    ▾]    │
│  ▸ 语音设置         >  │       │                        │
│  ▸ 视觉效果         >  │       │  STT 提供商             │
│  ▸ 连接            >  │       │  ○ Groq  ● Local       │
│  ▸ 桌宠模式         >  │       │                        │
│  ▸ 关于            >  │       │  TTS 情感               │
│                        │       │  [启用]  ☑              │
└────────────────────────┘       └────────────────────────┘
```

### Route Changes

```
Before:                          After:
/         → ChatPage             /         → MainView (character + chat)
/characters → CharactersPage     /settings → SettingsPage (with categories)
/settings → SettingsPage         /settings/characters → Characters category
/pet      → PetPage             /pet      → PetPage (unchanged)
```

**Delete**: Separate `/characters` route and nav tabs in Layout.

---

## 7. User Flow Diagrams

### Flow 1: Text Chat (Primary)

```
[App Opens]
    │
    ▼
[Main View: Character + Chat + Input]
    │
    ▼
User types in input ──► Presses Enter/Send
    │
    ▼
Message appears in chat ──► AI responds ──► Character animates
    │                                            │
    ▼                                            ▼
Chat scrolls to bottom                  TTS plays + character lip-syncs
    │                                            │
    ▼                                            ▼
User can type next message              Subtitle overlays on character
```

### Flow 2: Voice Chat

```
[Main View]
    │
    ▼
User clicks mic icon (in input area)
    │
    ▼
[Voice Popover opens above input]
    │
    ├── User speaks ──► Waveform visualizes
    │       │
    │       ▼
    │   STT processes ──► Text appears in popover
    │       │
    │       ▼
    │   [Auto-send] or [Fill input field for editing]
    │       │
    │       ▼
    │   AI responds ──► TTS plays ──► Character animates
    │       │
    │       ▼
    │   Barge-in: user speaks again ──► TTS stops ──► New recording
    │
    └── User clicks outside ──► Popover closes ──► Back to text input
```

### Flow 3: Change Character

```
[Main View]
    │
    ▼
User clicks ⚙️ (bottom-right)
    │
    ▼
[Settings Page replaces main view]
    │
    ▼
User taps "角色管理"
    │
    ▼
[Character grid with search/filter]
    │
    ├── Tap character card ──► Sets as active ──► Back to main
    ├── Tap "+" ──► Create form ──► Save ──► Back to grid
    └── Tap "←" ──► Back to settings list
```

### Flow 4: Adjust Settings

```
[Main View]
    │
    ▼
User clicks ⚙️ (bottom-right)
    │
    ▼
[Settings category list]
    │
    ▼
User taps category (e.g., "语音设置")
    │
    ▼
[Category detail with controls]
    │
    ├── Adjust settings (auto-save)
    └── Tap "←" ──► Back to category list ──► Tap "←" ──► Back to main view
```

### Flow 5: Clear Chat

```
[Main View]
    │
    ▼
User clicks 🗑️ (bottom-right)
    │
    ▼
[Confirmation popover: "清除所有聊天记录？"]
    │
    ├── [确认] ──► Chat cleared ──► Main view with empty chat
    └── [取消] ──► Popover closes ──► No change
```

---

## 8. Summary of Changes by Component

### DELETE
- `VoiceModeToggle.tsx` - replaced by integrated mic
- Nav tabs in `Layout.tsx` header - replaced by icon-based navigation

### MODIFY
- `ChatInput.tsx` → Add mic icon integration, popover trigger
- `MicButton.tsx` → Refactor into `VoiceMicPopover.tsx` (floating popover)
- `Layout.tsx` → Remove nav tabs, simplify to logo + icon cluster
- `ChatPage.tsx` → Remove top toolbar, move controls to icon clusters
- `SpeakingIndicator.tsx` → Convert to character area glow effect
- `VoiceSubtitle.tsx` → Reposition as overlay on character panel
- `ScreenshotToggle.tsx` → Move to settings, or icon-only in bottom-right
- `SettingsPage.tsx` → Add drill-down navigation, absorb Characters page
- `App.tsx` → Remove `/characters` route

### CREATE
- `VoiceMicPopover.tsx` - floating voice interaction popover
- `SettingsNav.tsx` - drill-down settings navigation component
- `ClearChatButton.tsx` - chat clear with confirmation

### STORE CHANGES
- `voiceStore.ts` → Remove `mode: 'text' | 'voice'`, add `isVoicePopoverOpen: boolean`

---

## 9. Interaction Principles Applied

1. **Progressive Disclosure**: Only show what's needed. Advanced features in settings.
2. **No Mode Switching**: Voice and text coexist. Mic is additive, not exclusive.
3. **Spatial Consistency**: Icons stay in fixed positions. No toolbar reconfiguration.
4. **Minimal Chrome**: Maximum space for character + chat content.
5. **Gesture-friendly**: Large touch targets in popover, small but accessible icons.
6. **Non-destructive Navigation**: Settings replaces main view but preserves state. Going back returns to exact previous state.
7. **Feedback Through Character**: Leverage the 3D character for state indication instead of UI chrome.

# Visual Design Gap Analysis: the-ai-U vs airi

## Executive Summary

the-ai-U currently uses a **tech-centric indigo/purple palette** with **heavy glass morphism effects** and an **information-dense toolbar approach**. The airi reference demonstrates a fundamentally different philosophy: **warm, organic, minimal chrome** that prioritizes the character experience over UI controls. The gap is significant across every visual dimension.

---

## 1. COLOR PALETTE PROPOSAL

### Current Problems
- **Primary color `#4f46e5` (indigo-600)** is cold, tech-focused, aggressive — completely wrong for a companion app
- Glass effects (`rgba(255,255,255,0.7)`) create visual noise rather than warmth
- Model background uses `indigo-50/purple-50/violet-50` gradient — screams "tech product"
- Chat user bubble `rgba(79,70,229,0.9)` is an intense opaque indigo — overpowering
- Dark mode uses `slate-900/950` tones — too cold and corporate

### Proposed Light Mode Variables
```css
:root {
  /* Backgrounds */
  --color-bg: #fefffe;                    /* warm white, slight green tint */
  --color-bg-secondary: #f8faf9;          /* very subtle green-tinted gray */
  --color-surface: #f0f5f2;              /* soft mint surface */
  --color-surface-hover: #e4ede8;        /* slightly deeper mint */
  
  /* Text */
  --color-text: #1a2e23;                 /* dark forest green instead of pure black */
  --color-text-secondary: #5a7366;       /* muted sage */
  --color-text-muted: #8fa89a;           /* light sage for placeholder/hints */
  
  /* Primary: warm mint/teal instead of cold indigo */
  --color-primary: #3aab85;             /* primary mint-green */
  --color-primary-hover: #2d9473;       /* deeper mint on hover */
  --color-primary-light: #e8f5ee;       /* very light mint tint */
  
  /* Borders — nearly invisible */
  --color-border: #dfe8e3;              /* very subtle green-gray */
  --color-border-light: #edf2ef;        /* almost invisible divider */
  
  /* Status — softer versions */
  --color-error: #e05555;
  --color-error-light: #fef0f0;
  --color-success: #3aab85;             /* matches primary */
  --color-success-light: #e8f5ee;
  --color-warning: #e0a030;
  --color-warning-light: #fdf8eb;
  
  /* Glass/overlay — warmer, less prominent */
  --color-shadow: rgba(26, 46, 35, 0.06);
  --color-glass: rgba(254, 255, 254, 0.85);
  --color-glass-border: rgba(200, 220, 210, 0.25);
  --color-glass-hover: rgba(254, 255, 254, 0.92);
  
  /* Chat — dramatically softened */
  --color-chat-user: rgba(58, 171, 133, 0.12);  /* light mint tint, NOT opaque */
  --color-chat-ai: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.0);    /* transparent — no visible bubble */
  
  /* Model area — warm off-white with green tint */
  --color-model-bg: linear-gradient(180deg, #f0f7f3 0%, #fefffe 60%, #f5faf7 100%);
  
  /* Header — minimal, nearly invisible */
  --color-header-bg: rgba(254, 255, 254, 0.92);
}
```

### Proposed Dark Mode Variables
```css
.dark {
  --color-bg: #0e1a14;                  /* deep forest instead of cold slate */
  --color-bg-secondary: #142018;
  --color-surface: #1c2e24;
  --color-surface-hover: #263b2f;
  --color-text: #e4ede8;
  --color-text-secondary: #8fa89a;
  --color-text-muted: #5a7366;
  --color-primary: #5cc89e;             /* brighter mint for dark backgrounds */
  --color-primary-hover: #4ab88e;
  --color-primary-light: #132a1f;
  --color-border: #1c2e24;
  --color-border-light: #162219;
  --color-error: #f07070;
  --color-error-light: #2a1010;
  --color-success: #5cc89e;
  --color-success-light: #0e2a1e;
  --color-warning: #f0b840;
  --color-warning-light: #2a1e08;
  --color-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25);
  --color-glass: rgba(14, 26, 20, 0.85);
  --color-glass-border: rgba(28, 46, 36, 0.35);
  --color-glass-hover: rgba(14, 26, 20, 0.92);
  --color-chat-user: rgba(92, 200, 158, 0.12);
  --color-chat-ai: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.0);
  --color-model-bg: linear-gradient(180deg, #0e1a14 0%, #142018 50%, #0e1a14 100%);
  --color-header-bg: rgba(14, 26, 20, 0.92);
}
```

### Key Changes Summary
| Element | Current (cold tech) | Proposed (warm organic) |
|---------|-------------------|----------------------|
| Primary | `#4f46e5` indigo | `#3aab85` mint-green |
| Text | `#111827` pure dark | `#1a2e23` forest dark |
| User bubble | Opaque indigo | Translucent mint tint |
| AI bubble | White glass | Transparent (no bubble) |
| Model BG | Indigo/purple gradient | Warm white-green gradient |
| Glass | Cold white glass | Warm near-invisible |

---

## 2. TYPOGRAPHY RECOMMENDATIONS

### Current State
- Font: `'Inter', 'DM Sans', system-ui` — good stack, keep it
- No CJK-specific font declared
- Sizes are reasonable but could be more refined

### Proposed Changes
```css
body {
  font-family: 'Inter', 'DM Sans', 'Noto Sans SC', 'PingFang SC', system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif;
  font-feature-settings: 'cv02', 'cv03', 'cv04', 'cv11';  /* Inter alternates for softer feel */
  -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
  letter-spacing: -0.01em;  /* slightly tighter for warmer feel */
}
```

### Font Scale (airi-inspired)
| Element | Current | Proposed | Rationale |
|---------|---------|----------|-----------|
| App title | `text-base font-bold` | `text-sm font-medium tracking-wide` | Less prominent, more elegant |
| Nav items | `text-sm` | `text-xs` | Smaller, less intrusive |
| Chat messages | `text-sm` (prose) | `text-[13px] leading-relaxed` | Slightly smaller, more breathing room |
| Input placeholder | default | `text-sm text-[var(--color-text-muted)]` | Soft teal placeholder like airi's "说点什么..." |
| Settings title | `text-xl` | `text-lg font-medium` | Less aggressive heading |
| Settings labels | `text-sm font-medium` | `text-xs font-medium uppercase tracking-wider` | Refined category labels |
| Settings descriptions | N/A | `text-xs text-[var(--color-text-muted)]` | Add sub-descriptions |

---

## 3. SPACING AND SIZING GUIDELINES

### Current Problems
- Header is too prominent (full nav bar with text + icons)
- Status bar adds another horizontal band of UI chrome
- Chat input area has visible borders and backdrop-blur
- Overall: too many horizontal bands creating visual layers

### Proposed Spacing System
```
Header:       32-36px height (currently ~40px) — reduce
Status bar:   REMOVE as separate bar, merge into minimal indicator
Chat area:    16px padding (keep)
Chat input:   12px padding, 0 visible border
Settings:     32px section spacing (currently 32px "space-y-8" — keep)
```

### Key Sizing Changes
| Element | Current | Proposed |
|---------|---------|----------|
| Header height | `py-2` (~40px) | `py-1.5` (~34px) or hidden |
| Status bar | Full-width bar | 8px dot only, integrated into header |
| Nav icons | `w-3.5 h-3.5` | `w-3 h-3` |
| Nav text | Visible | Hidden by default (icon-only) |
| Chat toolbar | Full-width with 5+ buttons | 2-3 tiny icons, bottom-right corner |
| Model viewer | `w-80` fixed | Flexible, larger proportion |
| Chat bubble max-width | `max-w-[70%]` | `max-w-[75%]` |
| Chat bubble padding | `px-4 py-2.5` | `px-3 py-2` |
| Send button | Full button with text | Icon-only, 28px circle |

---

## 4. CHAT PANEL VISUAL DESIGN

### 4A. Chat Messages

**Current**: Glass-morphism bubbles with backdrop-blur, visible borders, drop shadows, full-width emotion emojis. Very "app-like".

**Proposed** (airi-inspired minimal):

#### User Messages
```
- Background: var(--color-chat-user) — translucent mint tint, NOT opaque
- Text color: var(--color-text) — dark text on light tint (NOT white-on-color)
- Border: none
- Border-radius: 16px (top-left), 16px (top-right), 4px (bottom-right), 16px (bottom-left)
- Shadow: none
- Backdrop-blur: REMOVE
- Max-width: 75%
```

#### AI Messages
```
- Background: transparent OR var(--color-bg) — no visible bubble
- Text color: var(--color-text)
- Border: none
- Border-radius: N/A (no bubble visible)
- Shadow: none
- Backdrop-blur: REMOVE
- Emotion indicator: small colored dot (4px) beside message, NOT emoji
```

#### Typing Indicator
```
- 3 dots: keep, but use var(--color-primary) instead of muted gray
- Container: transparent background, no border
- Animation: slower, more gentle (0.8s instead of default bounce)
```

### 4B. Chat Input

**Current**: Glass background, backdrop-blur, visible border-top, rounded input with ring focus, gradient send button with text label.

**Proposed**:
```css
/* Input container */
- Background: transparent (no glass)
- Border-top: 1px solid var(--color-border-light)  /* barely visible */
- Padding: 12px 16px

/* Text input */
- Background: var(--color-surface) with 0.5 opacity
- Border: none (NO visible border)
- Border-radius: 20px (pill shape)
- Placeholder: "说点什么..." in var(--color-text-muted)
- Focus: no ring, just slight background darken
- Height: 36px

/* Send button: REMOVE text, icon-only */
- Shape: 28px circle
- Background: var(--color-primary) at 0.15 opacity
- Icon: Send arrow, 14px, var(--color-primary)
- On hover: background opacity increases to 0.25
- Disabled: opacity 0.3

/* Mic icon: integrated INTO input area (right side) */
- 14px icon, var(--color-text-muted)
- Inside the input field, right-aligned
```

### 4C. Speaking Indicator

**Current**: Horizontal bar with bouncing dots and text label. Reasonable but too prominent.

**Proposed**:
```
- Position: overlay on model viewer area (bottom), not in chat flow
- Style: 3 small dots (3px each) with gentle pulse animation
- No text label
- Color: var(--color-primary) at 0.6 opacity
- Container: no background, no border
```

---

## 5. DECORATIVE ELEMENTS

### 5A. Wave Pattern (airi's signature element)

**Add to model viewer area top**:
```
- SVG wave at the top of the character/model viewing area
- Color: var(--color-primary) at 0.08-0.12 opacity
- Height: 40-60px
- Pattern: smooth sine wave with 2-3 peaks
- Position: absolute top of model area
- z-index: above background, below character
```

**Implementation**: Create a `WaveDecoration` component:
```tsx
function WaveDecoration() {
  return (
    <svg className="absolute top-0 left-0 w-full h-12 opacity-[0.08]" viewBox="0 0 1200 60" preserveAspectRatio="none">
      <path 
        d="M0,30 C200,60 400,0 600,30 C800,60 1000,0 1200,30 L1200,0 L0,0 Z"
        fill="var(--color-primary)"
      />
    </svg>
  );
}
```

### 5B. Subtle Background Texture
```
- Very faint dot grid or noise texture on model viewer area
- Opacity: 0.02-0.03 (barely perceptible)
- Purpose: adds organic warmth vs flat color
```

### 5C. Message Transition
```
- New messages: gentle fade-in + slide-up (current implementation is good, keep)
- Reduce slide distance from 8px to 4px for subtlety
```

---

## 6. SETTINGS PAGE VISUAL DESIGN

### Current State
- Card-based sections with visible borders
- `hr` dividers between sections
- Standard heading + control layout
- Uses bg-[var(--color-surface)] for cards — visible gray boxes

### Proposed (airi-inspired):
```
Overall Container:
- max-w-2xl centered (keep)
- padding: 24px (keep)
- background: var(--color-bg) — pure, no surface tint

Section Layout:
- NO Card wrappers (remove border + background)
- Section title: text-xs, uppercase, letter-spacing: 0.05em, color: var(--color-text-muted)
- Section description: text-xs, color: var(--color-text-muted), below title
- Divider: 1px var(--color-border-light) — barely visible

Setting Items:
- Each item: flex row, label left + control right
- Vertical padding: 12px per item
- NO visible backgrounds
- Hover: background var(--color-surface) at 0.5 opacity
- Border-radius on hover: 8px

Controls:
- Toggle switches: use var(--color-primary) when active
- Buttons: ghost style with subtle hover
- Segmented controls (theme/language): pill shape, var(--color-surface) background,
  active segment: var(--color-primary-light) background + var(--color-primary) text
```

### Settings Header
```
- REMOVE the Settings icon + title combo at top
- Instead: just show section groups directly
- Page title can be in nav highlight (already there)
```

---

## 7. CONCRETE CSS CHANGES NEEDED

### Priority 1: index.css (color variables)
Replace all CSS variables as specified in section 1 above.

### Priority 2: Button component (`ui/button.tsx`)
```
Change default variant:
  FROM: "bg-indigo-600 text-white hover:bg-indigo-700 focus-visible:ring-indigo-500"
  TO:   "bg-[var(--color-primary)] text-white hover:bg-[var(--color-primary-hover)] focus-visible:ring-[var(--color-primary)]"

Change ghost variant:
  FROM: "hover:bg-gray-100"
  TO:   "hover:bg-[var(--color-surface)]"
```

### Priority 3: Input component (`ui/input.tsx`)
```
Change border/focus colors:
  FROM: "border-gray-300 ... focus:border-indigo-500 focus:ring-indigo-500"
  TO:   "border-[var(--color-border)] ... focus:border-[var(--color-primary)] focus:ring-[var(--color-primary)]"
```

### Priority 4: ChatMessage.tsx
```
User bubble:
  FROM: "bg-[var(--color-chat-user)] backdrop-blur-sm text-white"
  TO:   "bg-[var(--color-chat-user)] text-[var(--color-text)]"
  (Remove backdrop-blur-sm, change text from white to dark)

AI bubble:
  FROM: "bg-[var(--color-chat-ai)] backdrop-blur-sm border border-[var(--color-glass-border)]"
  TO:   "bg-transparent"
  (Remove backdrop-blur, remove border, make transparent)
```

### Priority 5: ChatInput.tsx
```
Form container:
  FROM: "bg-[var(--color-glass)] backdrop-blur-md border-t border-[var(--color-glass-border)]"
  TO:   "bg-transparent border-t border-[var(--color-border-light)]"

Input field:
  FROM: "bg-[var(--color-bg)]/50 border-[var(--color-glass-border)] focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[var(--color-primary)]/20"
  TO:   "bg-[var(--color-surface)]/50 border-none focus:ring-0 focus:bg-[var(--color-surface)]/70 rounded-full"

Send button:
  FROM: "rounded-xl bg-gradient-to-r from-[var(--color-primary)] to-[var(--color-primary-hover)]"
  TO:   "rounded-full w-8 h-8 p-0 bg-[var(--color-primary-light)] text-[var(--color-primary)]"
  (Remove gradient, make circular, reduce size, change to subtle coloring)
```

### Priority 6: Layout.tsx (header)
```
App title:
  FROM: "bg-gradient-to-r from-[var(--color-primary)] to-purple-500 bg-clip-text text-transparent font-bold"
  TO:   "text-[var(--color-primary)] text-sm font-medium tracking-wider"
  (Remove gradient, simplify to single color, reduce weight)

Header background:
  FROM: "bg-[var(--color-header-bg)] backdrop-blur-md"
  TO:   "bg-[var(--color-bg)]"
  (Remove glass effect, use solid but light background)
```

### Priority 7: ChatPage.tsx (toolbar)
```
Status bar:
  FROM: full-width bar with glass background
  TO:   merge status dot into header, remove separate bar

Model viewer background:
  FROM: "bg-gradient-to-br from-indigo-50/50 via-purple-50/30 to-violet-50/50 dark:from-indigo-950/30..."
  TO:   "bg-[var(--color-model-bg)]"
  (Use CSS variable gradient instead of hardcoded indigo/purple)

Toolbar buttons (Pet mode, Timeline, Screenshot, Character):
  FROM: Full buttons with text labels in toolbar bar
  TO:   Small icon-only buttons (12-14px), positioned bottom-right of model area, low-contrast
```

### Priority 8: SettingsPage.tsx
```
Remove:
  - Settings icon + title header
  - <hr> elements (replace with subtle border-bottom on sections)

Card component usage:
  FROM: Card with border + background
  TO:   div with no border, no background, just padding
```

### Priority 9: MicButton.tsx
```
FROM: "bg-red-500 text-white animate-pulse" / "bg-gray-200 text-gray-600"
TO:   "bg-[var(--color-primary)]/15 text-[var(--color-primary)]" (listening)
      "bg-[var(--color-surface)] text-[var(--color-text-muted)]" (idle)
(Remove red, align with mint palette)
```

### Priority 10: New component needed
```
WaveDecoration.tsx — SVG wave pattern for model viewer top
```

---

## Visual Design Principles Summary

1. **Color warmth**: Replace ALL indigo/purple with mint-green/teal tones
2. **Reduce chrome**: Remove glass effects, borders, backdrop-blur wherever possible
3. **Subtle over bold**: Translucent tints instead of opaque colors; barely-visible borders instead of prominent ones
4. **Organic feel**: Wave decorations, rounded shapes, warm neutrals
5. **Character-first**: Model viewer area should dominate; UI controls should be nearly invisible
6. **Consistent theming**: Use CSS variables everywhere, eliminate hardcoded indigo/gray-* in components
7. **CJK support**: Add Chinese font families to the font stack

---

## Implementation Order

1. `index.css` color variables (foundation)
2. `ui/button.tsx` + `ui/input.tsx` (affects everything)
3. `ChatMessage.tsx` + `ChatInput.tsx` (core experience)
4. `Layout.tsx` header simplification
5. `ChatPage.tsx` toolbar reduction
6. `SettingsPage.tsx` + settings components
7. `WaveDecoration.tsx` new component
8. `MicButton.tsx` palette alignment
